title: LocalizedContentPage
description: RFC 0103 (spec/v1/localized-content.md §B). An authored content page: an ordered composition of sections addressed by a URL `slug`. Publication status is atomic across locales for v1. SEO carries hreflang + og:locale alternates so a renderer can emit per-locale link relations.

pageId.description: Stable identifier of the page within its tenant.

slug.description: URL slug for public delivery (`GET /v1/content/pages/{slug}`). Lowercase, hyphen-separated.

status.description: Publication status, atomic across locales for v1. A `draft` page MUST NOT be served on the public delivery path.

sectionOrder.description: Ordered list of `sectionId`s defining the page's render order.

seo.description: Optional SEO metadata for per-locale link relations.
